title: miliusa astiana
intro: Miliusa astiana, also known as the Himalayan Miliusa, is a plant species native to the Himalayan regions of India and Nepal. It is a woody climber with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as provide relief from skin conditions and digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots can be dried and made into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
